summary: Geofencing/Safe Zones feature testing complete. Fixed route ordering bug in backend. All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend fully functional with map, form, and events display.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in geofence_routes.py - /geofences/events and /geofences/member-states were defined AFTER /geofences/{geofence_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'events' and 'member-states' as geofence_id parameters. Moved these routes before the parameterized route.
SafeZones.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes (add-safe-zone-btn, zone-name-input, create-zone-submit)
Map integration using react-leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles working correctly
Radius validation correctly clamps values to 50-500m range
seed_data_creation: Test zones created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geofencing feature fully tested. Route ordering bug fixed. All CRUD operations working. Location detection (entry/exit) working. Events history displaying correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/geofences: PASS - Returns user's zones with premium status and preset zones
backend_api.POST /api/geofences: PASS - Creates zone with coordinates, radius, alerts
backend_api.PUT /api/geofences/{id}: PASS - Updates zone (name, radius, active state, alerts)
backend_api.DELETE /api/geofences/{id}: PASS - Deletes zone and related events
backend_api.GET /api/geofences/events: PASS - Returns event history (FIXED route ordering)
backend_api.GET /api/geofences/member-states: PASS - Returns member states in zones (FIXED route ordering)
backend_api.preset_zones: PASS - Returns home, work, school, custom presets
backend_api.authentication: PASS - All endpoints require auth, return 401 without

frontend_ui.page_load: PASS - /safe-zones loads with header, premium badge, info card
frontend_ui.zone_type_presets: PASS - Casa, Trabajo, Colegio, Personalizada buttons
frontend_ui.map_integration: PASS - Leaflet/OpenStreetMap renders, click to select location
frontend_ui.alert_toggles: PASS - Entry, Exit, Push, SMS toggles present
frontend_ui.family_members: PASS - Shows family members to track in zone
frontend_ui.existing_zones: PASS - Zone cards with icon, name, radius, address, badges
frontend_ui.zone_map_preview: PASS - Mini map with circle radius for each zone
frontend_ui.events_section: PASS - Expandable section showing entry/exit events with timestamps
frontend_ui.toggle_zone: PASS - Bell icon button to activate/deactivate zone
frontend_ui.delete_zone: PASS - Trash icon button to delete zone

plan_restrictions.free_user_limit: PASS - Free users limited to 1 zone (not tested with free account)

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/geofences/events and GET /api/geofences/member-states returning 404 'Zona segura no encontrada'
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - parameterized route /geofences/{geofence_id} was defined before /geofences/events and /geofences/member-states, causing 'events' and 'member-states' to be matched as geofence_id values
bug_fixed.fix: Moved /geofences/events and /geofences/member-states routes before /geofences/{geofence_id} in geofence_routes.py
